findings.description: The hint "AsyncMessageSendAction" does not appear anywhere in the source document. The source only mentions "AsyncMessageSendActionSettings" (in the Formクラス and SQLファイル sections). "AsyncMessageSendAction" (without the "Settings" suffix) is not a class name referenced in this source file.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4/s5 reference "AsyncMessageSendActionSettings" only. No occurrence of "AsyncMessageSendAction" as a standalone class name exists in the RST source.
